title: U3f14
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:U_3f14_hlf.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''U3f14'' taking an enemy [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighter]] back to [[XQ6 Platform]] ''Research''.]]
[[Heavy Lifter/Legends|Heavy Lifter]] '''''U3f14''''' served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] used Heavy Lifter ''U3f14'' to retrieve [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] found carrying [[Mag-pulse warhead/Legends|Mag-pulse Torpedoes]] during the "[[Arms Race]]." ''U3f14'' took the captured B-wings disabled by Imperial [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] back to [[XQ6 Platform]] ''[[Research]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
